word: H2604 - חֲנַן - chănan - khan-an' - Shew mercy

sections.paragraph:
Original: חנן

Transliteration: chănan

Phonetic: khan-an'

BDB Definition:

  1. to show favour
    1. (Peal) to show favour
    2. (Ithpael) to implore favour

Origin: corresponding to H2603

TWOT entry: 2737

Part(s) of speech: Verb
